evidenceSummary: Official Coloplast South Africa campaign displayed a free SpeediCath Short sample form and stated that requests are qualified and verified for product suitability.
Official Coloplast sample clauses stated that approved sample requests are dispatched separately within three business days and receive free delivery in South Africa.

Official Coloplast South Africa campaign still displayed the free SpeediCath Short sample form, stated that requests are qualified and verified for suitability, and limited requests to people who use or have been prescribed an intermittent catheter.

Official Coloplast sample clauses still stated that suitability-approved samples are dispatched separately within three business days with free delivery and discreet packaging from Coloplast South Africa.
Official Brand Advisor application page invited 150 Instagram creators with at least 1,000 followers to apply for a Parmalat EasyGest hamper in exchange for two Instagram reels.
Official Brand Advisor application page invited 100 Instagram creators with at least 1,000 followers to apply for a Kinder hamper in exchange for one family-focused Instagram reel.
Official Brand Advisor application page invited 250 TikTok creators with at least 1,000 followers to apply for a Sunlight hamper in exchange for two TikTok videos.
Official Brand Advisor application page invited Instagram creators with at least 1,000 followers and an active TikTok presence to apply for a Clover Krush hamper in exchange for two Instagram posts.
